api/Wolfgang.Extensions.Logging.InMemory.title: Class InMemoryLoggerProvider | Wolfgang.Extensions.Logging.InMemoryLogger Documentation
api/Wolfgang.Extensions.Logging.InMemory.summary: Class InMemoryLoggerProvider An ILoggerProvider that creates InMemoryLogger instances and provides access to all log entries across all loggers. Inheritance object InMemoryLoggerProvider Implements ILoggerProvider IDisposable Inherited Members object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() Namespace: Wolfgang.Extensions.Logging.InMemoryLogger Assembly: Wolfgang.Extensions.Logging.InMemoryLogger.dll Syntax public sealed class InMemoryLoggerProvider : ILoggerProvider, IDisposable Constructors | Edit this page View Source InMemoryLoggerProvider(LogLevel) Initializes a new instance of the InMemoryLoggerProvider class. Declaration public InMemoryLoggerProvider(LogLevel minLogLevel = LogLevel.Trace) Parameters Type Name Description LogLevel minLogLevel The minimum log level for all loggers created by this provider. Properties | Edit this page View Source LogEntries Returns all log entries from all loggers created by this provider. Entries are grouped by logger category; ordering across categories is not guaranteed. Declaration [SuppressMessage("Major Code Smell", "S2365:Properties should not make collection or array copies", Justification = "This is a test-helper property whose entire purpose is to return a snapshot view; the copy semantics are intentional and idiomatic for assertion code.")] public IReadOnlyList<LogEntry<object>> LogEntries { get; } Property Value Type Description IReadOnlyList<LogEntry<object>> Remarks Each access materializes a snapshot of the entries across all loggers; the cost is O(n) in the total entry count. Test code typically reads this once per assertion. | Edit this page View Source Loggers Returns all logger instances created by this provider. Declaration [SuppressMessage("Major Code Smell", "S2365:Properties should not make collection or array copies", Justification = "This is a test-helper property whose entire purpose is to return a snapshot view; the copy semantics are intentional and idiomatic for assertion code.")] public IReadOnlyDictionary<string, InMemoryLogger> Loggers { get; } Property Value Type Description IReadOnlyDictionary<string, InMemoryLogger> Remarks Each access materializes a snapshot copy of the underlying logger map; cost is O(n) in the number of distinct categories logged through this provider. Methods | Edit this page View Source CreateLogger(string) Creates a new InMemoryLogger with the given category name. Returns Type Description ILogger An ILogger instance.
